heading: Index Field Order
body:
The type of query operation in the query shape affects the order of the
fields used to construct the index. In general, the Performance Advisor ranks fields by
their [cardinality](manual/reference/glossary).

The following table shows how the Performance Advisor ranks various operation types by
order of relative importance:

| Rank | Operation Type      | Example Operator |
| ---- | ------------------- | ---------------- |
| 1    | Equality match      | $eq              |
| 2    | Array query         | $in              |
| 3    | Range query         | $gte             |
| 4    | Type query          | $type            |
| 5    | Exists              | $exists          |
| 6    | All other operators | $nearSphere      |
| 7    | Sort                | sort()           |
